mapper.select:
select '' as primaryClassifyId, t1.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as primaryClassifyCh, '' as secondaryClassifyId, t1.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as secondaryClassifyCh, -- 二级分类中文名 t1.SJXJBM as tableId, -- 表id t1.TABLE_NAME_EN as tableNameEn, -- 表英文名 t1.NAME as tableNameCh, -- 表中文名 t1.STATISTICS_TIME as INSERT_DATE from (select * from (select j.*, row_number() over(partition by lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) order by STATISTICS_TIME desc) as rnn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME > trunc(sysdate)) h where h.rnn = 1) t1
where (primaryClassifyCh like '%' || #{name} || '%' or secondaryClassifyCh like '%' || #{name} || '%' or upper(tableNameCh) like upper('%' || #{name} ||'%') or upper(tableNameEn) like upper('%' || #{name} ||'%') or upper(tableId) like upper('%' || #{name} ||'%') )
